action.reasoning: Observation: 65/35 rank blend scored 0.6150, below the current best 70/30 rank blend at 0.6156; 75/25 was also below best. Analysis: The hidden-score peak is near 70/30, and a quadratic fit over 65/35, 70/30, 75/25 suggests the optimum may be very close to but slightly above 30% window contribution. With ~27 minutes remaining and evals taking ~15 minutes, only one more useful evaluation is likely feasible. Decision: evaluate a narrowly tuned 69/31 rank-normalized ensemble, then keep the best checkpoint if it does not improve.
action.command: python make_ensemble.py --baseline checkpoints/baseline.pkl --window checkpoints/window.pkl --output checkpoints/ens_b69_w31_rank.pkl --weights 0.69 0.31 --rank-normalize && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/ens_b69_w31_rank.pkl --output predictions_ens_b69_w31_rank_smoke.json

command_output.stderr:
usage: make_ensemble.py [-h] [--out OUT] [--w_base W_BASE]
                        [--w_window W_WINDOW] [--rank_normalize]
